name: school-organizer
description: Desktop planner for courses, assignments, and grades.
author: 7shep

scripts.build: npm run build:renderer && npm run build:electron
scripts.dev:app: wait-on tcp:5173 file:dist/electron/main.js && cross-env VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 electron .
scripts.dist:mac: npm run build && electron-builder --mac dmg zip --universal --publish never
scripts.dist:mac:dir: npm run build && electron-builder --mac dir --universal --publish never
scripts.dist:mac:unsigned: npm run build && electron-builder --mac dmg zip --universal --publish never -c.mac.identity=null -c.mac.hardenedRuntime=false
scripts.dist:win: npm run build && electron-builder --win nsis --publish never
scripts.release:mac: npm run build && electron-builder --mac dmg zip --universal --publish always
scripts.release:mac:unsigned: npm run build && electron-builder --mac dmg zip --universal --publish always -c.mac.identity=null -c.mac.hardenedRuntime=false
scripts.release:win: npm run build && electron-builder --win nsis --publish always
